notes: Identity is derived directly from the existing Slime Move frame 000; no character regeneration or recolor is used in the delivered frames.
The eight-frame idle uses restrained source-derived squash/stretch with a fixed horizontal center and fixed y=460 opaque-pixel baseline.
No footstep cue, attack anticipation, projectile, VFX, particle, ground, shadow, scene, text, or baked world travel is present.
CC must integrate this source set separately and test it at x4; no browser/x4 approval is claimed here.
